TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Paongaongan, title = Paongaongan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paongaongan} }

S.FORM: Paongaongan Itiniay i Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Paongaongan a niyaro', 159 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 437 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 80% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 351 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 20% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 86 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 76%, Bunun 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: pao~uŋao~uŋan itiniaj i ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u pao~uŋao~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
S.FORM: Paongaongan Itiniay i Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Paongaongan a niyaro', 159 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 437 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 80% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 351 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 20% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 86 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 76%, Bunun 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: pao~uŋao~uŋan itiniaj i ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u pao~uŋao~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
